parameters.query:
WITH fechas AS (
  SELECT
    TO_CHAR((now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Santiago')::date - INTERVAL '1 day', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS fecha_desde,
    TO_CHAR((now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Santiago')::date + INTERVAL '10 days', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS fecha_hasta
),
alojamientos_json AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
    json_agg(
      json_build_object(
        'listing_id', "AlojamientoStayslistingIdLargo",
        'listing_name', "AlojamientoStaysInternalName", 'listing_number', "AlojamientoNumero"
      ) ORDER BY "AlojamientoStaysInternalName"
    ) FILTER (WHERE "AlojamientoStayslistingIdLargo" IS NOT NULL AND "AlojamientoStayslistingIdLargo" <> ''),
    '[]'::json
  ) AS alojamientos
  FROM public."Alojamiento"
)
SELECT f.fecha_desde, f.fecha_hasta, a.alojamientos
FROM fechas f, alojamientos_json a
